settings.heading: The JRNY App
settings.text: Personalised adaptive workouts for cardio, strength & full‐body fitness. Try risk-free with 2 months free. Train on your BowFlex, Schwinn or mobile device!”

settings.heading: Download on iOS
settings.text: JRNY brings you a fitness membership that evolves with you. Access adaptive workouts, trainer-led classes, whole-body routines, and heart-pumping cardio. Enjoy 2 months free, connect your BowFlex or Schwinn device, and train with friends or family—anytime on iPhone or iPad.”

settings.heading: Download on Google Play Store
settings.text: Get fit with JRNY: Adaptive workouts, strength & cardio classes, virtual coach, and more. Free 2-month trial. Supports BowFlex & Schwinn connected machines; also works on Android phones & tablets with thousands of workout options.

settings.heading: Adaptive & personalised training:
settings.description: JRNY learns from your workouts (fitness level, preferences, time you have, how you feel) and adjusts routines over time so you stay challenged—not bored.

settings.heading: Extensive content
settings.description: Trainer-led classes, whole-body workouts, scenic routes and integrated entertainment keep exercise fresh.

settings.heading: Seamless equipment integration
settings.description: Works perfectly with BowFlex and Schwinn bikes, treadmills, ellipticals and strength machines, or simply on your mobile.

JRNY is an all-in-one fitness platform that transforms the way you train, blending personalised coaching, intelligent tracking and a huge library of workouts in a single app. After a quick fitness assessment, JRNY builds a bespoke plan that adapts automatically as you improve, so every session stays challenging and rewarding. It integrates seamlessly with BowFlex and Schwinn connected equipment—treadmills, indoor cycles, ellipticals and strength machines—capturing detailed performance data such as speed, resistance, distance and heart rate. Prefer to train without kit? JRNY also offers hundreds of body-weight, yoga and strength sessions that you can follow on your phone or tablet, all guided by a virtual coach who provides real-time encouragement while the app updates your plan daily based on previous results and how you feel before each session.

Motivation is built in at every step. You can join trainer-led classes, explore scenic virtual routes or stream your favourite entertainment while you work out, keeping exercise fresh and engaging. Up to six household members can create their own tailored profiles under a single subscription, while clear progress charts and milestone badges keep everyone accountable. New members enjoy a two-month free trial, giving plenty of time to experience everything before committing to a flexible membership. Whether you are chasing weight loss, building strength or improving endurance, JRNY removes the guesswork and delivers professional-level guidance anywhere, any time. Download it now from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store and start a fitness journey that evolves with you.
